$comment: Cycle-of-Trust reference policy pack — ADMIN MANAGED settings. Install at the OS managed-settings path (macOS: /Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/managed-settings.json; Linux: /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json). Managed settings CANNOT be overridden by the user or the agent — this is the only layer whose deny survives, and disableBypassPermissionsMode is the only mechanism that makes the boundary hold in EVERY permission mode (delta D1). ⚠ Verify `disableBypassPermissionsMode` against the current managed-settings docs before rollout — it is the load-bearing key.
